title: Baseball Savant Leaderboards 2024-2025 (via savant-extras)
subtitle: 20 Baseball Savant & FanGraphs leaderboards as clean CSV files — 2024 and 2025 seasons
description:
# Baseball Savant Leaderboards 2024–2025

20 leaderboards for the **2024–2025 MLB seasons**, collected using **[savant-extras](https://pypi.org/project/savant-extras/)** v0.4.3 and **[pybaseball](https://github.com/jldbc/pybaseball)**.

## Files (20 CSVs, each with a `year` or `season` column)

| File | Category | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bat_tracking_2024_2025.csv` | Batting | Bat speed, attack angle, swing tilt |
| `batted_ball_2024_2025.csv` | Batting | GB/FB/LD rates, pull/oppo splits |
| `home_runs_2024_2025.csv` | Batting | HR distance, exit velo, xHR, no-doubters |
| `swing_take_2024_2025.csv` | Batting | Run values by zone (heart/shadow/chase/waste) |
| `year_to_year_2024_2025.csv` | Batting | xwOBA year-over-year changes |
| `pitch_tempo_2024_2025.csv` | Pitching | Median seconds between pitches |
| `pitch_movement_2024_2025.csv` | Pitching | Horizontal and vertical break by pitch type |
| `pitcher_arm_angle_2024_2025.csv` | Pitching | Release point angles |
| `running_game_2024_2025.csv` | Pitching | Pitcher running game control |
| `timer_infractions_2024_2025.csv` | Pitching | Pitch clock violations |
| `pitcher_quality_2024_2025.csv` | Pitching | Stuff+ / Location+ / Pitching+ via pybaseball |
| `arm_strength_2024_2025.csv` | Fielding | Fielder throw speed by position |
| `outs_above_average_2024_2025.csv` | Fielding | OAA with directional breakdowns via pybaseball |
| `outfield_jump_2024_2025.csv` | Fielding | First-step reaction and routing via pybaseball |
| `catcher_blocking_2024_2025.csv` | Catching | Blocks above average |
| `catcher_throwing_2024_2025.csv` | Catching | Pop time, CS rate, arm strength |
| `catcher_stance_2024_2025.csv` | Catching | One-knee vs traditional stance impact |
| `baserunning_2024_2025.csv` | Baserunning | Total baserunning run value |
| `basestealing_2024_2025.csv` | Baserunning | Stolen base run value, lead distances |
| `park_factors_2024_2025.csv` | Park | Runs/HR/FIP park factors per team (FanGraphs) |

## How This Data Was Collected

Data was fetched using **[savant-extras](https://github.com/yasumorishima/savant-extras)** (v0.4.3) and **[pybaseball](https://github.com/jldbc/pybaseball)**:

```python
pip install savant-extras pybaseball

from savant_extras import bat_tracking, park_factors
from pybaseball import statcast_outs_above_average, statcast_outfielder_jump, fg_pitching_data

df_pf  = park_factors(2025)                          # Park factors (savant-extras)
df_oaa = statcast_outs_above_average(2025, 'all')    # OAA (pybaseball)
df_oj  = statcast_outfielder_jump(2025)              # Outfield Jump (pybaseball)
df_pq  = fg_pitching_data(2025, qual=0)              # Stuff+ / Location+ / Pitching+ (pybaseball)
```

All 20 leaderboards demonstrated with visualizations in the companion notebook.

## Links

- **savant-extras on PyPI**: [pypi.org/project/savant-extras](https://pypi.org/project/savant-extras/)
- **Source code**: [github.com/yasumorishima/savant-extras](https://github.com/yasumorishima/savant-extras)

## Data Sources

- Baseball Savant (MLB Advanced Media) — 17 leaderboards via savant-extras
- FanGraphs — Park Factors (savant-extras), Pitcher Quality / OAA / Outfield Jump (pybaseball)
- Seasons: 2024 regular season + 2025 regular season
